faqItems.question: Why is a beta testing approach used?
faqItems.answer: We firmly believe that player feedback is key to improving the product experience. By opening Mac beta testing, we hope everyone can experience the content early, helping us gather authentic feedback and suggestions to continuously refine the product.

faqItems.question: When will the official version be released?
faqItems.answer: We are working hard to polish the product while ensuring both progress and high-quality user experience. The final decision on whether to extend the beta or release the official GameHub for Mac will be based on test feedback and development progress.

faqItems.question: How to link a Steam account?
faqItems.answer:
After entering the Mac client, click the user avatar on the right side of the top navigation bar to open the profile popup.
For first-time Steam linking, click "Log in to Steam" and authorize via credentials or QR code.
To link additional Steam accounts, go to your profile, find Steam Account Management, click "Add Account", and authorize via credentials or QR code.

faqItems.question: How to import game files?
faqItems.answer:
Method 1: Click "Import Game" from the sidebar or game library, select "Add Game Program" and choose an exe file; or select "Scan Folder" to automatically scan for exe files.
Method 2: Drag and drop exe files from your device into the client.
Method 3: Double-click an exe file on your device.
After importing, the system will automatically parse game information and supports editing game cover, name, and description.
Once added, you'll be redirected to the game library. If the imported game isn't found, click the refresh button in the top navigation bar.

faqItems.question: How to configure emulator compatibility profiles?
faqItems.answer:
Official compatibility profiles are prepared for some games (the list of games with dedicated profiles is continuously updated), click Start Game to use the default profile.
Advanced users can also flexibly configure custom profiles. After importing game files, go to the game details page, open Win emulator settings to manage emulator containers and dependencies.
faqItems.linkText: the list of games with dedicated profiles is continuously updated

faqItems.question: How to contact the GameHub team?
faqItems.answer: To facilitate in-depth communication with players, we've set up a QQ group (Group ID: 1079246543) for this beta. The group provides beta download guides, Q&A support, and feedback collection. Welcome to join!
